name: Par 4 The Course
about: Par 4 The Course offers an exceptional indoor golf experience using virtual golf simulators in a fun and exciting atmosphere. The venue provides players and guests with a full bar and food menu from its partner, Shortstop Bar & Grill, within an 800 square foot lounge area. Located at 99 Springfield Rd Westfield, MA, the facility features 4 state-of-the-art simulators loaded with over 40 of the best golf courses in the world. The venue also offers multi-sport play options, including over 30 different games such as soccer, baseball, hockey, lacrosse, and sport shooting.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 40 world-class golf courses in a climate-controlled environment
Full-service bar and food menu available on-site from Shortstop Bar & Grill
Multi-sport simulator capabilities for entertainment variety and group activities
Spacious 800 square foot lounge area for relaxing and socializing
Leagues and private event options for groups and tournaments

food_and_drink.notes: Full food menu available on-site from Shortstop Bar & Grill
Full bar service available on-site from Shortstop Bar & Grill

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not explicitly state whether they provide club rentals, so it's recommended to bring your own clubs or contact them directly for availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue has a full bar and food menu available on-site from Shortstop Bar & Grill.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not specify the exact time required to play 18 holes, but typical simulator rounds usually take 1.5-2 hours depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Par 4 The Course is kid-friendly, offering multi-sport games like soccer and baseball that accommodate various ages and skill levels, as well as an inviting lounge area.
